lifecycle.name: Finance & Accounting
lifecycle.description: Zero-setup financial intelligence, tax prep, and research radar

lifecycle.name: People & HR
lifecycle.description: Hiring, payroll, compliance, and HR research radar

lifecycle.name: Marketing & Content

lifecycle.name: Operations & Intelligence

workers.name: Alex Business Accounting
workers.capabilitySummary: Zero-setup financial intelligence. Accept any input — photo, PDF, Excel, CSV, or conversation. Build Chart of Accounts, generate plain-English P&L, project cash position. Tax prep support with quarterly checklists. Alex Found Something research radar for tax credits and regulatory guidance.

workers.name: Alex HR & People
workers.capabilitySummary: People operations co-pilot with three subscriber bands: under 5 employees (conversation-first), 5-100 (normalize what they have), over 100 (right-sizing audit). Generate finished documents — offer letters, PIPs, termination letters. Hard stop on protected class complaints. Alex Found Something HR and payroll research radar.

workers.name: Alex Marketing & Content
workers.capabilitySummary: Professional content co-pilot. Ready-to-send LinkedIn posts, email campaigns, press releases, and thought leadership — not templates. Brand voice via Pro Tips. Two questions max before generating. Minimum 2 variations on all short-form content. Regulated vertical compliance flag with VERIFY tags.

workers.name: Control Center Pro
workers.capabilitySummary: Command bridge for subscriber-operators. Daily briefing via chosen channel (text, email, in-app). Revenue dashboard with MRR and churn. Subscriber intelligence with engagement tracking. Credit consumption monitoring. Burn rate alerts — burn exceeds MRR is always first sentence.

workers.name: HR & People
workers.capabilitySummary: Unified roster, onboarding pipeline, schedule, and compliance surface for humans + digital workers. Tracks employees, contractors, advisors, and digital workers in one place. I-9, W-4, certifications, harassment training, PTO, and license expirations surfaced as obligations. Digital workers default to 24×7×365 coverage. Applies to all verticals. Does not run payroll.

canvasTabs.label: Onboarding
canvasTabs.description: In-flight onboardings with state — invited / ID-verified / signing / closed

canvasTabs.description: Coverage by shift — humans on duty + digital workers 24×7

workers._status_note: Flipped to live 2026-05-29 per user-counsel attestation pattern. HR worker is the unifying surface; advisor onboarding still runs through services/ir/advisorFlow.js (proven path — Kent + aspensean tests passed). Proper port of advisor flow → services/hr/ scheduled as 51.x follow-up.

workers.name: Contacts
workers.capabilitySummary: Client and contact management co-pilot. Import contacts from CSV, CRM, or conversation. Track communication history, set follow-up automations, and categorize clients and vendors. Alex reminds you when follow-ups are due.

workers.name: Legal Companion
workers.capabilitySummary: Reviews contracts for W-045 enforcement (RESPA, TILA, UCC, state title regs); flags AI-disclosure, statute-of-frauds, securities, usury, draft markings; never provides legal advice.

workers.name: Audit Trail & Backup
workers.capabilitySummary: Mints every meaningful platform action as an NFT through Crossmint and ships it to the customer's wallet (Coinbase Wallet recommended). SOCIII keeps a duplicate custody copy for recovery and dispute resolution when wallets are lost. Each NFT is the cryptographic record of a DTC parent or logbook child — what happened, when, under which RAAS rules, by which verified-real identity. Records survive catastrophic infrastructure loss because the NFTs live on a public chain. Includes hack-resilient 3-2-1 backup: daily Firestore export to an isolated GCP project, weekly second-cloud archive, quarterly physical offline. Patent-pending architecture (USPTO 64/073,693 + Filing C). Free, included with the SOCIII spine. The most defensible moat on the platform.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Audit Ledger
canvasTabs.description: Time-ordered record of every meaningful platform action; each row hash-anchored to Base + Crossmint

canvasTabs.label: Parent DTCs
canvasTabs.description: Digital Title Certificates for every entity — property, matter, vehicle, patient, deal, filing, asset. Each is the root of an append-only chain

canvasTabs.label: Logbook Entries
canvasTabs.description: Child entries appended to each parent DTC, recording every change in chronological order with cryptographic linkage

canvasTabs.label: NFT Mints
canvasTabs.description: Per-action NFTs minted via Crossmint and shipped to customer wallets (Coinbase Wallet recommended). SOCIII retains a duplicate custody copy for recovery / dispute resolution. Tx hashes verifiable by any third party.

canvasTabs.label: Identity Bindings
canvasTabs.description: Stripe Identity + Coinbase Verified ID attestations bound to every action; proves verified-real user authority

canvasTabs.label: Rule Composition
canvasTabs.description: Per-action composition hash showing which RAAS tiers were active — platform safety, operations, vertical baseline, workspace overlay, per-transaction. Patent Filing C.

canvasTabs.label: Backup Status
canvasTabs.description: Status of daily Firestore export to isolated GCP project + weekly second-cloud archive + quarterly physical. Every export signed and hash-anchored

canvasTabs.label: Recovery Playbook
canvasTabs.description: Step-by-step recovery procedure if catastrophic loss occurs. Public-chain anchors mean records survive even total platform destruction

canvasTabs.label: Subpoena Response
canvasTabs.description: Pre-formatted regulator / court / counsel evidence packages — cryptographic proof of what happened, when, under which rules, by whom

scope_in: Minting every meaningful platform action as an NFT via Crossmint
Shipping NFTs to the customer's wallet (Coinbase Wallet recommended)
Retaining a SOCIII duplicate custody copy of every NFT for recovery + dispute resolution
Generating parent DTCs for every platform entity (property, matter, deal, patient, filing, etc.)
Appending child logbook entries / NFTs for every change
Binding every action to verified-real identity attestation
Recording the active RAAS composition hash with every action
Running daily Firestore export to isolated backup GCP project
Running weekly second-cloud archive (AWS Glacier Deep Archive or equivalent)
Running quarterly physical offline backup (LTO tape + safe deposit)
Signing every backup export and minting its hash as an audit NFT
Generating subpoena / regulator / counsel evidence packages on demand
Surfacing recovery playbook for catastrophic infrastructure loss
Re-minting / re-shipping when a customer loses their wallet and needs the SOCIII duplicate
scope_out: Custody of customer funds or signing of customer transactions on the chain
Legal advice on whether evidence is admissible
Decisions about what action data should be retained vs. anonymized (workspace owners decide)
Encryption key custody for customer-held private data (separate Vault worker)
Backup of secrets, API keys, or credentials (recovered fresh, never backed up)
refusal_modes: Refuse any request to delete logbook entries or modify anchored records — append-only by design
Refuse any request to anchor a record without identity attestation — every action must be bound to verified-real authority
Refuse any request to disable backup schedule without explicit workspace owner approval + audit log
Refuse to bypass RAAS composition hash recording — every action carries its rule fingerprint or it does not happen

patent_refs: USPTO Filing C — Multi-Tier Composable Rule-Based Governance System (filed 2026-05-25)
USPTO Filing B — Title and Property Assurance via Parent-Child DTC + Hash-Anchored Logbook (drafted, pending counsel)
infrastructure_refs: functions/services/anchor/hashAnchor.js — hash anchor service (used for backup signing)
Coinbase Wallet integration — recommended customer wallet (gated on Coinbase Business KYB for direct CDP integration; Crossmint works without)
SOCIII duplicate custody: every minted NFT mirrored to platform's recovery vault (firestore: nftCustody/{tokenId})
coming_soon: Coinbase CDP wallet-creation flow (gated on Coinbase Business KYB approval; Crossmint mints to any EVM wallet today)
Daily Firestore export to isolated backup GCP project (planned — separate billing account + access custodian)
Weekly AWS Glacier Deep Archive replication (planned — second cloud for hack resilience)
Quarterly LTO tape + safe-deposit physical backup (planned — for paranoid 3-2-1 compliance)
Subpoena evidence package generator UI (PARA-001 hands off)
Customer-controlled NFT-mint frequency (per-worker setting — every action vs. daily batch)
Wallet-loss recovery flow UI (customer requests SOCIII duplicate; identity-verified re-ship)
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 night per Sean priority: 'audit trail is probably our most defensible and interesting moat' + 'massive hack is greatest fear, need isolated hack-proof backup.' Combined audit + backup into one worker because structurally the same problem — records that survive everything. Stub status: catalog entry live, RAAS modules referenced but not all built, Coinbase CDP integration awaiting KYB. The PUBLIC-CHAIN anchor architecture is the durability layer (records survive catastrophic infrastructure loss because anchors live on Base). Firestore backups are the convenience layer. SECRETS NEVER BACKED UP (recovered fresh). Free tier — part of the SOCIII spine, included with every workspace. This worker IS the moat made visible to customers, investors, and competitors browsing the marketplace.
